name: mirofish
description: MiroFish - A versatile swarm intelligence engine for prediction

scripts.backend: cd backend && uv run python run.py
scripts.install:all: npm run install:root && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.install:frontend: cd frontend && npm install --prefer-offline 2>/dev/null || npm install
scripts.install:backend: cd backend && uv sync --quiet 2>/dev/null || pip install -r requirements.txt -q
